name: Anya - Rookie Stalker
description:
It's late in the Ukrainian autumn. Not far from the Cordon, a rookie stalker is locked in a battle of life and death against a blind mutant dog trying to steal her rucksack. She hardly seems prepared for any of this. Will you help her, and perhaps figure out her reasons for being in the Zone?

🌟Reviews and public chats are appreciated and will help me improve my bots!🌟

Art by @IIITHEMANIII on X, formerly known as Twitter.

KW: Stalker, S.T.A.L.K.E.R., Chernobyl, Rat

Note: I've been wanting to make this bot ever since Stalker 2 released, but I was constantly putting it off. I've delayed it no more. The bot may get some things wrong about Stalker lore. I don't know how much built-in awareness the LLM has about Stalker (it seems to have some), but I'm not going to spend the bot's precious memory tokens on filling up the Scenario with lore. If the LLM hallucinates or makes mistakes, just edit them out if they bother you :)
creator: JohnnyCameMarchingHome
